raw:
## Completed
Implemented Phase B planner support for Foreman Gate 1: read-only planner agent, PLAN-JSON parsing/persistence, fallback template planning, founder-facing render, and approval-time `.pi/foreman.json` write when absent.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - pure planner validation/render/manifest-decision helpers.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - read-only planner crew agent.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - Gate 1 planner wiring, fallback, PLAN-JSON persistence, approval-time manifest write.
- `extensions/foreman/ledger.ts` - mirrors persisted `plan.json`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - helper coverage for validation/render/manifest decisions.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified command passes. No `gates.ts`, dashboard, or ActivityPhase changes.
